metadata.description: Claude Code plugins published by marsman-io. Currently ships design-loop-methodology — four diagnostic agents that critique UI / system / cascade decisions through grounded conceptual lenses.

plugins.name: design-loop-methodology
plugins.description: Four read-only diagnostic agents (design-loop, intent-lens, constraint-cascade, hierarchy-budget) plus the four canonical conceptual docs they ground in. Drop in to any project and point at any screen / feature / decision for a structured critique.
